text:
Created attachment 193229
patch to update the port

- update 2016060801 -> 2017060201
Changes: http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/ABIGAIL/Regexp-Common-2017060201/Changes
- add LICENSE_FILE_*
- adopt mainainership after 5-month-long maintainer timeout.
- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20180328 runs ok:
	at 11.1-release-amd64,
	perl 5.26.2
- "make test" for this port (as run from within the same poudriere's jail) say: "PASS".
